summary: Added @nuxtjs/i18n (^10) to Nuxt 4: modules + i18n block with prefix_except_default, defaultLocale en, locales en (en-US) and pt-BR (pt-BR) with lazy JSON under i18n/locales, i18n/i18n.config.ts fallbackLocale en, detectBrowserLanguage (root redirect, cookie bergamota_i18n_redirected, secure in prod), baseUrl from NUXT_PUBLIC_SITE_URL or VERCEL_URL or localhost:3027, experimental.strictSeo for automatic hreflang/canonical. Moved title/description into locale JSON; app/plugins/i18n-seo.client.ts applies translated head on client. Build verified. Commit 73bca79 pushed to run branch.

env.NUXT_PUBLIC_SITE_URL: Set in production for correct absolute hreflang/canonical URLs (falls back to VERCEL_URL or http://localhost:3027)
